query: Eiffel Tower height metres official height 330 m
answer: The Eiffel Tower is 330 meters tall, including its broadcast antenna, making it the tallest structure in Paris and a globally recognized landmark. It stands at 1,083 feet high and was the tallest structure ever built for 41 years.

results.title: Eiffel Tower Height: 330m (1,083 ft) – Dimensions, Weight & Fun Facts
results.snippet: The Eiffel Tower stands 330 metres (1,083 feet) tall including its broadcast antenna, making it the tallest structure in Paris and one of the most recognizable landmarks on Earth. The Eiffel Tower's total height of 330 metres includes the broadcast antenna added to its summit. View looking up at the Eiffel Tower iron lattice structure. Eiffel Tower structural details and iron beams. The iron lattice structure of the Eiffel Tower weighs approximately 7,300 metric tonnes (about 8,047 US tons). Every seven years, the Eiffel Tower receives a fresh coat of paint – a process that requires approximately 60 tonnes (about 66 US tons) of paint and takes 18 months to complete by a team of 25 painters working entirely by hand. Due to thermal expansion of its iron structure, the Eiffel Tower is measurably taller in summer than in winter. For 41 years, the Eiffel Tower was the tallest structure ever built. With approximately 7 million visitors each year, the Eiffel Tower holds the record as the world's most-visited paid monument.
